retrieved_result: Grounding and Bonding Grounding and Bonding A brief introduction to grounding systems is provided in IEEE Std 142-2007, the definition of “ground” is “a conducting connection, whether intentional or accidental, between an electrical circuit or equipment and the earth, or to some other body that serves in place of the ear
